title: Trump rally-goers ask if Harris is 'really part of' Black community
shortDescription: Donald Trump has questioned Kamala Harris' racial identity. Black supporters at Trump's Atlanta rally repeat his talking point.

title: Trump missteps stir GOP worry as campaign seeks Vance reset
shortDescription: Trump's campaign seemed more disciplined to some Republicans. Now his running mate is generating controversy, as are recent racially-charged comments.

title: US judge sets August hearing in Trump felony election case
shortDescription: Though still unlikely to be tried before the 2024 election, Trump's DC criminal case now has an Aug. 16 hearing to set a new court schedule.

title: Jimmy Carter says he's 'trying to make it' to 100 to vote for Harris
shortDescription: Former President Jimmy Carter, 99, tells family he's holding on to vote for Kamala Harris for president

title: Trump-Harris debate in flux; candidates split on who's agreed to what
shortDescription: Trump in a late Friday social media post said he's agreed to a Sept. 4 debate on Fox News. Harris said she'll stick with the original Sept. 10 plan.

title: Harris energizes Democrats, shakes up race. Can she keep this up?
shortDescription: Democrats demoralized by Joe Biden’s performance and likely loss to Donald Trump think they have a shot at winning with Kamala Harris atop ticket.

title: Secret Service says it did not have staff in Trump rally command post
shortDescription: Acting Secret Service Director Ronald Rowe said the agency had a security room, but didn't participate in unified command post at rally.

title: Who's running to represent Wyoming in Congress?
shortDescription: The Cowboy State will likely send Republicans to Congress in November, but that's to be decided by primary voters on Aug. 20.

title: Court reverses itself on Arizona voter registration rules
shortDescription: Arizonans can register to vote without providing proof of citizenship, a 9th Circuit Court order states. But they're limited to federal elections.

title: Homeless Georgians to face restrictions under new election law
shortDescription: Starting in 2025, non-residential addresses will no longer be accepted for voter registration. Advocates for the homeless are sounding the alarm.

title: Biden, Harris greet freed prisoners on US soil after being released from Russia
shortDescription: The historic swap followed months of negotiations by the Biden administration and other nations, and involved 24 prisoners across six countries.
